_comment: Logistics signals consolidated from the fragmented sources named in the case (EDI feeds, supplier email, carrier spreadsheets). The ETA tool reasons over these to produce a single real-time ETA, which TMC lacks today.

shipments.notes: Nexa email 2026-06-16: 'MCU components delayed from our supplier, monitoring.'
Vessel booking unconfirmed; port congestion flag raised by freight forwarder.
